title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: LEBANON AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity for families to build and buy their own homes. The houses are sold at no profit to homeowner families, who provide sweat equity labor to help build the houses. 566 S Main Street Lebanon, OR 97355 Eligibility: Applicants must: meet income requirements, be in need of affordable housing, willing to partner with Habitat, and be able to make mortgage payments. Hours: Varies Email (541) 405-5213 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Housing (541) 405-5213 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Households are responsible for a closing fee of up to $3000. Habitat mortgages include the monthly mortgage payment (which includes taxes, insurance, and condo fees, if applicable) and is no more than 30% of the homeowner's gross monthly income at the time of the sale. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97329, 97327, 97345, 97355, 97386 SITE HOURS: Thursday-Friday 10am-5pm, Saturday 10am-4pm Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - LEBANON HABITAT RESTORE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME REPAIR AND PRESERVATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LEBANON AREA HABITAT FOR HUMANITY
